title: kalimeris incisa var. australis
intro: Kalimeris incisa var. australis, also known as the cut-leaf daisy or Japanese aster, is a perennial herb in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, Kalimeris incisa var. australis is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
